notes:
MILESTONE pass: Parts 1-2 (floating-mascot crit1, hat-bubble crit2) are DONE + audit-passed (both _build and _test audits pass); Strike settled the queue and compressed notes into MEMORY/brief.md. Director armed Part 3 (floating-card-panel, crit3): research->plan->build->test (+auto AUDIT on build). SERIALIZE -- Part 3 runs alone to its audit; every visual part edits the same Cheffy/CheffyPanel CSS surface, so Parts 4-6 are NOT armed yet. Remaining order after P3: P4 polish (crit4, tailwind tokens/spacing/typography), then P5 screenshot-gate (crit5 -- arm ONLY after P1-P4 all audit-passed, since shots must capture FINAL pixels), then P5b MANDATORY OPUS visual-review (crit6/5b, LAST).

Part 3 gap (grounded in CheffyPanel.astro + Cheffy.astro): CheffyPanel.astro has NO <style> block and Cheffy.astro has no .cheffy-panel CSS, so the dialogue panel is essentially UNSTYLED today. Part 3 adds a NEW <style> block (and a scrim element) to CheffyPanel.astro ONLY, implementing: (1) ONE inset floating card that scales across all viewports via clamp()/min() -- always inset from all edges over a scrim, min/max-clamped, desktop/tablet = floating corner card, phone near-fills but stays the SAME inset card (never a fullscreen mode); (2) a fixed semi-transparent scrim (page visible around card, layered vs #cheffy z-index 200); (3) SMOOTH open AND close animation, transform/opacity only, reduced-motion -> instant; (4) a clear close affordance. KEY SEAM RISK the research must resolve: the panel shows/hides via panel.hidden set by Cheffy.astro's .cheffy-toggle (~lines 310-320); hidden=display:none can't be transitioned, and the panel script MUST NOT touch panel.hidden/aria-expanded (owned by part-2). Research must find a smooth-close approach needing ZERO Cheffy.astro edits (e.g. @starting-style + transition-behavior:allow-discrete, or aria-expanded/data-state-driven scrim+card); only if genuinely impossible does the Planner escalate (plan-scope-wrong -> DIRECT) rather than edit the shared Cheffy.astro file.

TAGGING POLICY (DoD override, unchanged from P1/P2): the P3 BUILD is deliberately NOT --criterion-tagged (criterion:null, mirroring job_cheffy_p2_hatbubble_build). Visual criteria 1-4 are signed off ONLY by the mandatory Opus 5b visual-review verdict -- crit3 stays 'pending' through its Sonnet build/test audits and is flipped to 'done' by the Director at sign-off (direct dod_progress write) ONLY after notes/cheffy-visual-review.md records PASS for crit3 at all 3 breakpoints. reconcile-dod is a no-op on untagged jobs and only handles crit5 (P5 build) and crit6/5b (P5b review) once those are tagged/run.

Behavior (state machine/dialogue/calendar/ICS/checklist/notifications) is already built and working -- every P3 rung is PRESENTATION-ONLY; do NOT rebuild or touch behavior JS.
